# docs(benefits): refresh AgentMemory.md + DeployingTheAgentOS.md (why-care + local-model/self-heal value)

Part of #14310 · follow the content rubric pinned on #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** the memory + deploy benefit entries undersell, lack the local-model / self-heal value, and don't carry the why-care framing.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Each follows problem → resolve → why-care → what's-in-it.
- [ ] Carry the local-OR-remote model + self-healing "runs unattended" value; proven-today vs trajectory kept honest.

**Files:** `learn/benefits/AgentMemory.md`, `learn/benefits/DeployingTheAgentOS.md`.
